NATO 2010: Advanced All-Terrain Autonomous Systems

TTIS researchers Şafak Güner and Zeynel Koç participated in NATO Advanced Study Institute's workshop on autonomous systems. The research consisted of path following for a robot using several sensors. A presention for this work is
